meta.subject: TFWWorkbench (smotti/TFWWorkbench) x RE-UE4SS on The Forever Winter (UE 5.4.2)
meta.notes: Root cause = C++ mod ABI mismatch: TFWWorkbench ships a precompiled dlls/main.dll (219,136 bytes) ABI-locked to the UE4SS SDK it was built against (~Jan 2026, experimental v3.0.1-848/-849). Newer UE4SS renames/removes a mangled C++ export -> Windows loader aborts with 0x7F ERROR_PROC_NOT_FOUND. status: works|broken|partial|unknown. confidence: verified (first-hand)|reported (community/issue)|inferred|untested. UE4SS is git-describe-versioned 'v3.0.1-<N>-g<hash>' with NO stable release since 3.0.1; identify unlabeled builds by UE4SS.dll SHA-256.

entries.symptom: ABI mismatch (older direction) + predates the UE5.4 experimental layout TFW uses
entries.notes: Below the community floor. main.dll was compiled against a ~Jan-2026 experimental build (CppUserModBase + ue4ss/ layout); its ABI does not match bare stable 3.0.1 either. The TFW scene does not run bare 3.0.1 for UE5.4.2.

RECOMMENDED PIN. Nexus-stated floor 'UE4SS MUST BE VERSION v3.0.1-848 OR HIGHER' (author incl. Terraru) and the inferred ABI baseline main.dll was built against (mod pushed 2026-01-20). CAVEAT: exact ABI commit not pinned in the repo; -848 is a community minimum, and the 'OR HIGHER' guidance is now stale (newer builds break it).

ABI drift accumulates across ~160 commits. The exact first-breaking commit was NOT bisected. Builds near -849 likely still load; the inflection point where an imported decorated symbol is renamed/removed/inlined is undetermined.

entries.symptom: Failed to load dll ...main.dll... error: [0x7f] The specified procedure could not be found (ERROR_PROC_NOT_FOUND)
entries.notes: Live failure: TFWWorkbench issue #2 (OPEN, 2026-07-14) reports v0.2.1's main.dll failing with 0x7F on current experimental UE4SS. CONFOUND: issue does not state the reporter's UE4SS build; issue #1's identical 0x7F was closed as a user install error.

entries.ue4ss_build: experimental-latest CI (local install 2026-07-12) - same channel, ~1-2 commits before b50986bd
entries.symptom: expected 0x7F main.dll load failure (predicted; confirm via UE4SS.log after a launch)
entries.notes: Ground-truth local build (see local-evidence/2026-07-13-local-install.md). On the experimental-latest channel ~v3.0.1-1011, ~160 commits of C++ ABI drift past main.dll's Jan-2026 baseline. First-hand confirmation pending an in-game launch to read UE4SS.log. NOT literally commit b50986bd (that asset appeared 2026-07-13, after install).
